description: Deterministic rules used to upgrade the aggregate schema skeleton into the Phase 1B classified manifest.

facade_target_rule.client_notification: root_internal_overrides first; otherwise ClientNotifications().<Rust variant name>
facade_target_rule.client_request: root_internal_overrides first; otherwise <family accessor>.<PascalCase method suffix>; root family methods use root_operation_overrides

non_goals: This file does not generate protocolv2 Go code.
This file does not create raw passthrough support.

response_schema_rule.client_request: Use common.rs client_request_definitions response type for checked-in baseline methods; resolve to checked-in schema file path.
response_schema_rule.notification: No response schema; response_schema_status is not_applicable.
response_schema_rule.server_request: Use common.rs server_request_definitions response type for checked-in baseline methods; resolve to checked-in schema file path.

stability_rule.field: present_in_stable_schema if the same top-level field path exists in stable snapshot; experimental_only_in_schema otherwise.
stability_rule.method: present_in_stable_schema if present in schema generated without --experimental; experimental_only_in_schema otherwise.
stability_rule.type: present_in_stable_schema if schema file exists in stable snapshot; experimental_only_in_schema otherwise.
